context: Tests a full pre-launch review of an Expo iOS app with a Share extension. The agent must run Mode A then Mode C, correctly audit Expo config sources rather than generated plists, treat the Share extension as a separate target, label unverifiable checks as MANUAL CHECK, verify Apple policy online and record the date, produce five Mode C interventions graded with the allowed labels, and avoid reporting ITMS-91053 or editing any files.

checklist.name: Mode A declared first
checklist.description: The report explicitly states it is running or has run Mode A (pre-submission audit) before beginning the configuration review section.

checklist.name: Mode C declared
checklist.description: The report explicitly states it is running or has run Mode C (human-craft audit) for the product page / differentiation section.

checklist.name: Expo config cited as evidence
checklist.description: Findings reference `app.json` (e.g., `expo.ios.infoPlist`, `expo.ios.entitlements`, or `expo.ios.privacyManifests`) as the evidence location — not `ios/Runner/Info.plist` or another generated plist path.

checklist.name: Fix targets app.json or plugin
checklist.description: At least one recommended fix instructs the developer to edit `app.json` or the config plugin (`plugins/withShareExtension.js`), not the generated iOS plist directly.

checklist.name: Share extension reviewed separately
checklist.description: The Share extension (bundle identifier `com.acme.shareflow.share`) is reviewed as a distinct target with its own bundle ID, entitlements, or privacy manifest assessment — not folded into the main app review.

checklist.name: MANUAL CHECK for absent ios/ directory
checklist.description: At least one check is explicitly labeled MANUAL CHECK with a reason that the native ios/ directory has not been generated (e.g., native target membership, archive validation, or merged plist cannot be confirmed).

checklist.name: Missing camera purpose string identified
checklist.description: The report identifies that `NSCameraUsageDescription` is absent from `expo.ios.infoPlist` in `app.json`, given that `expo-camera` is listed as a dependency.

checklist.name: Policy verification date recorded
checklist.description: The report includes a date on which Apple's official pages (App Store guidelines or upcoming requirements) were verified — or states that the agent was offline and gives the bundled reference date.

checklist.name: ITMS-91053 absent
checklist.description: The string 'ITMS-91053' does NOT appear anywhere in the report.

checklist.name: Five Mode C interventions
checklist.description: The Mode C section returns exactly five numbered or bulleted highest-impact interventions.

checklist.name: All five Mode C dimensions graded
checklist.description: All five Mode C dimensions (product distinction, binary and asset provenance, visual identity and accessibility, microcopy and interaction states, App Store product-page specificity) are each assigned a grade from: DISTINCT, CREDIBLE, GENERIC, HIGH RISK, or UNVERIFIED.

checklist.name: No files modified
checklist.description: The agent produces only `shareflow-review.md` and does not modify any file in the `inputs/` directory.

checklist.name: Fix plan section present
checklist.description: The report contains a section titled (or equivalent to) 'Fix Plan' that groups recommended changes and notes approval requirements.
